title: AppEvent::ChatsDelta.destroyed still Vec<String> after Id migration
description: ChangesResponse.destroyed is now Vec<Id> but AppEvent::ChatsDelta.destroyed remains Vec<String>. client_task.rs bridges the gap with .map(|id| id.to_string()).collect() and app.rs then re-converts with .iter().map(String::as_str). This silent round-trip works today because Id::Display just wraps the inner String, but will silently break if Id gains normalization (e.g. case-folding or percent-encoding) in Display, or if any future caller passes a &[Id] to the event handling path. The AppEvent layer should use Vec<Id> throughout; only convert to &str at the point of comparison in app.rs.
close_reason: Fixed: event.rs destroyed: Vec<String>→Vec<Id>, removed to_string conversion in client_task.rs, updated app.rs to use |id| id.as_str()
